element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic ranged weapon, foundation for combat
Fast melee enemies, require different tactics

typical_relief_triggers: Finding health pickups in secret rooms
Eliminating all enemies in a room
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced action with moment-to-moment tension from combat encounters interrupted by exploration and puzzle-solving via key collection and secret discovery

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Walls that slide back when activated reveal secret rooms; treasure and health indicate optional areas
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Certain wall tiles activate to slide back and reveal hidden rooms containing treasures, health refills, or ammunition

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic combat with pistol and knife against Nazi guards; simple spatial navigation; knife as safe melee fallback
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of submachine gun; dog enemies appear with different attack patterns; locked doors require key collection; more complex level layouts
difficulty_curve.late_game: Chain gun availability; increased enemy density; higher-level soldiers; final boss encounters at end of each episode
notable_spikes: Final level of each episode features boss fight with particularly difficult enemy
Introduction of dogs as faster, more aggressive melee enemies
Chain gun ammunition management in later levels

notable_level_patterns.description: Ten levels per original episode grouped into named thematic sets (Nazi bunkers and buildings). Final level of each episode is dedicated boss fight. Player starts each episode with four lives.
Locked doors are placed throughout levels to gate progression; player must find keys placed in the environment to advance. Creates pacing breaks between combat encounters.
Each level is a flat plane divided into areas and rooms by grid-based wall and door patterns, all of equal height. Creates maze-like navigation structure.

Hidden rooms are scattered throughout levels and revealed by activating certain wall tiles that slide back. Contain treasures, health refills, or ammunition. Optional content for score/completion bonuses.
Final level of each episode culminates in boss fight with particularly difficult enemy. Represents difficulty spike and thematic conclusion.
